Title: Design task dashboard
Description: Create the initial layout for the task management dashboard.

Title: Implement task filtering
Description: Add API support for filtering tasks by status, priority, assignee, and search term.

Title: Write repository tests
Description: Add unit tests for create, update, delete, and lookup behavior in the file-backed repository.

Title: Add validation messages
Description: Improve create and update responses with clear validation errors for invalid task payloads.

Title: Document API endpoints
Description: Prepare request and response examples for all task API endpoints.

Title: Review concurrency handling
Description: Verify file locking behavior and expected version handling for concurrent task updates.

Title: Create task summary endpoint
Description: Return total, pending, in-progress, completed, high-priority, and overdue task counts.

Title: Improve CORS configuration
Description: Update CORS settings so the frontend can call the task API during local development.

Title: Add assignee task view
Description: Build an endpoint workflow for returning tasks assigned to a specific user.

Title: Prepare release checklist
Description: List deployment steps, smoke tests, and rollback notes for the task API release.
